basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT)
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) Teaching Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website. Have been announced through the SVNIT Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./M.Phil in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry, Ph.D. in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry
qualification.details: Teaching Assistant (M.Sc./M.Phil): 1st Class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.Sc./ M. Phil in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry with a good academic record. Teaching Assistant (Ph.D.): Ph.D. in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry with a good academic record and 1st class or an equivalent CGPA (Min 6.5 on the scale of 10) in M.Sc. (Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry).

salary_details.details: Teaching Assistant (M.Sc./M.Phil): Rs. 45,000/- Per Month Teaching Assistant (Ph.D.): Rs. 60,000/- Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Teaching Assistant at Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT).

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q3. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held on 15th June 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Teaching Assistant post?
faq.answer: The qualifications include M.Sc./M.Phil in Chemistry/Applied Chemistry/Industrial Chemistry or Ph.D. in the same fields, with specific CGPA requirements.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Assistant position?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 45,000/- to Rs. 60,000/- per month, depending on the qualification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Teaching Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Registration, Document Verification, and a Written Test/Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is SVNIT located?
faq.answer: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology (SVNIT) is located in Surat, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.
